name: Coffee Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oil, sugar and eggs, mixing well.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the dry ingredients (flour, salt, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon) and add to the wet mixture, blending until just combined.
3. Stir in vanilla extract and black coffee, ensuring everything is evenly mixed.
4. Fold in chocolate chips, making sure they are distributed throughout the batter.
5. Pour the mixture onto a large greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 15 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
7. Allow to cool before cutting into squares.
Source: "The Yankee Kitchen" 03-31-93 (#2) [Debbie from Richfield]
